creator: kristinacors
caption: Did you know about THIS hotel in Texas?! To discover other luxury hotels check out the playlist for this series linked below! #travelbuckletlist #travelcontentcreator #luxurytravels #luxuryhotel #traveltiktok

transcription.text: Luxury hotels for people who don't do ordinary. Part A. This hotel has giraffes living on the property and no, it's not in Kenya. It's in Fredericksburg, Texas. Imagine waking up in your room, stepping onto the balcony and seeing a 16-foot giraffe walking past your window, just casually roaming the property while you're staying there. And yes, you can actually spend time with them while you're here. Guests can actually book private giraffe encounters where you get super close, health care for them, and learn about why giraffes are actually one of the most threatened large animals on earth. But what makes this place really special is that it's not just a hotel. It's also a wildlife conservation sanctuary. Their mission is to combine luxury travel with wildlife conservation. And the idea is that guests who meet the animals become more emotionally connected and more likely to support wildlife conservation to help fund research, education, and breeding programs that support giraffe protection around the world. So your stay isn't just unforgettable, it actually helps support the future of these animals. The name of this hotel is Long Neck Manor. Follow this series to learn about more luxury hotels around the world.
